name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / terminal output

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant output.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 23H2 -->
- App version: <!-- Help/About or the installer version -->
- Installed how: <!-- Squirrel installer / built from source -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — does it happen every time, only with a panel
open, only after an update, etc.?
